work_done: Created scripts/validation/check_branch_workflow.py (validator-level branch workflow + old source + source-of-truth)
Updated templates/auto_mode_round_input.md with Section 4B (mandatory branch strategy)

mechanical_gates_summary.gate_a_hook: Blocks non-merge direct commits on canonical via PowerShell script called from pre-commit/pre-push
mechanical_gates_summary.gate_b_validator: Python validator checks branch workflow, old source references, and source-of-truth lock
mechanical_gates_summary.gate_c_template: Round input template mandates branch_strategy field and source-of-truth verification

observations: This is a governance infrastructure round with no business logic changes.
Hook and validator modifications are explicitly authorized by this round's topic.
All 3 gate categories are implemented: hook (A), validator (B), template (C).
Gate C (template) is partially mechanical because it relies on human checkbox verification.
Future work: make template layer fully mechanical by parsing round input at commit time.
